title: polygala subandina
intro: Polygala subandina is a species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae, commonly known as the milkwort family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Polygala subandina include its potential to improve immune function, reduce stress and anxiety, and support respiratory health. The herbal preparation of Polygala subandina is often found in tea or capsule form, although specific preparation methods may vary depending on the region and cultural traditions.
